title: ジャパンカップの後に・伝えたい一言

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa thrills the audience with her
victory against Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this race wasn't enough for Special Week.
She's eager for a rematch with El Condor Pasa at
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This now means that El Condor Pasa, Special
Week, and Grass Wonder will all face off in the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the Arima Kinen has turned into a
battle between three close friends and a
much-anticipated race for the audience.
